releasedToday.title: KL7
releasedToday.highlight: 2025年最受期待的嘻哈重磅专辑
releasedToday.highlightEn: The most anticipated hip-hop heavyweight album of 2025
releasedToday.summary: Kendrick Lamar 的全新专辑《KL7》延续其深刻的叙事风格与实验性制作，融合爵士、放克与意识流说唱，是今年最具文化影响力的嘻哈作品之一。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Kendrick Lamar's new album 'KL7' continues his profound storytelling and experimental production, blending jazz, funk, and stream-of-consciousness rap—one of the most culturally impactful hip-hop releases of the year.

releasedToday.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedToday.highlight: 流行巨星未完成的梦幻自白
releasedToday.summary: Lil Nas X 的《DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)》以未完成形态呈现，充满自省与脆弱感，融合流行、电子与另类元素，展现艺术家的成长与实验精神。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Lil Nas X's 'DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)' arrives in an unfinished form, full of introspection and vulnerability, blending pop, electronic, and alternative elements to showcase the artist's growth and experimental spirit.

releasedToday.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedToday.highlight: Dave Matthews Band 现场录音典范
releasedToday.highlightEn: Dave Matthews Band live recording masterpiece
releasedToday.summary: 《Warehouse 2026》捕捉了 Dave Matthews Band 在里士满的完整现场，即兴演奏与观众互动完美融合，是乐迷必收的现场佳作。
releasedToday.summaryEn: 'Warehouse 2026' captures DMB's full live set in Richmond, blending improvisation and crowd energy—a must-have for fans of live recordings.

releasedToday.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedToday.highlight: 布鲁斯摇滚传奇的美国现场
releasedToday.highlightEn: Blues rock legend's live performances in the USA
releasedToday.summary: Robin Trower 的《One Moment in Time: Live in the USA》收录了其在美国巡演中的精彩现场，吉他音色浓郁，情感饱满，是布鲁斯摇滚爱好者的珍藏。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Robin Trower's 'One Moment in Time: Live in the USA' features stunning live recordings from his US tour, with rich guitar tones and emotional depth—a treasure for blues rock enthusiasts.

releasedToday.title: Euphoria
releasedToday.highlight: 德国电子音乐大师的迷幻旅程
releasedToday.summary: Schiller 的《Euphoria》延续其标志性的氛围电子风格，融合管弦乐与空灵人声，营造出沉浸式的听觉体验，适合冥想与深夜聆听。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Schiller's 'Euphoria' continues his signature ambient electronic style, blending orchestral elements with ethereal vocals to create an immersive listening experience, perfect for meditation and late-night sessions.

releasedToday.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedToday.highlight: 民谣诗人1975年的珍贵现场
releasedToday.summary: Don McLean 的《Living Free (Live Manchester '75)》记录了这位民谣传奇在曼彻斯特的现场，经典曲目与即兴故事交织，怀旧而真挚。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Don McLean's 'Living Free (Live Manchester '75)' captures the folk legend's live performance in Manchester, weaving classic songs with spontaneous stories—nostalgic and heartfelt.

releasedToday.title: The Power Station
releasedToday.summary: The Power Station 的同名专辑《The Power Station》以全新制作重现80年代舞曲摇滚的黄金音色，是复古摇滚乐迷的惊喜之作。
releasedToday.summaryEn: The Power Station's self-titled album revives the golden sound of 80s dance-rock with fresh production—a delightful surprise for retro rock fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
releasedThisWeek.artist: Manaka Kataoka, Yasuaki Iwata, Hajime Wakai

releasedThisWeek.title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
releasedThisWeek.artist: Manaka Kataoka, Yasuaki Iwata, Hajime Wakai, Soshi Abe
